rag_rules: Fix type mismatches by aligning helper declarations with expression types; use int, real, or bool as appropriate
Resolve 'named thing must be an expression with a type' errors by ensuring all identifiers are visible or properly declared in the same annex
Correct 'Couldn't resolve reference' errors by using only valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) and visible AADL features
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, ensure all expressions have consistent types and all references are resolvable within the same annex scope
When generating AGREE equations or guarantees, validate that helper declarations match the types of their assigned expressions
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers in AGREE annexes unless explicitly present in the AADL model
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `const`, `eq`, and `gua` for declarations in AGREE annexes
Ensure all visible AADL features are referenced correctly in AGREE expressions
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new package references or types not present in the AADL model's configured dependencies
Do not reference unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in AGREE contracts
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
